states.name: Timia
states.title: Captain of the Guard
states.description:
Some men go to war for glory. Others for love of battle. Timia joined the war to follow in her father's footsteps, to see his dream of a united Erden fulfilled.

When she was but a child, he showered her with tales of the Bergarian royalty. The early tribal kings who shepherded their people through the mountains. The first true emperor, born of the Primordial of Light. They fought with true nobility, liberating the land from the tyrants who would divide it.

Their legends planted the seeds of courage in her heart. And when her father fell in battle, those seeds burst into bloom.

states.name: Timia
states.title: Captain of the Guard
states.description:
Despite her youthful idealism, Timia is no fool. She knows all too well the cost of war. In her military training, her superiors made her memorize the casualties of past battles. They led her unit to rebel villages, forcibly crushed to keep their people under Imperial rule. In every eye, she saw the pain of her father's death, and she came to a resolution.

She could not allow this to continue.

As long as divisions among the people exist, there will be war. As long as there is war, innocent blood will flow. For the sake of lasting peace, the other lands of Erden must fall. And until their people understand that, Timia will do what she must.
